offer: For restaurant accounting managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate sales tax filings cause potential penalties. We generate accurate monthly sales tax filing reports instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate sales tax filings leading to potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant accounting managers

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
